title: Digital Pots
dataVariables: Rhythm and Volume of the Interlude

visualChannels.comment:
Height of the vase shows the length of the piece.
the longer the piece the longer the construction of the shape
The bumps at the surface of the vases encode the rhythm and volume of the interlude.
visualChannels.dataVariable: Rhythm and Volume of the Interlude

visualChannels.comment: The shape encodes the rhythm and volume as well.
visualChannels.dataVariable: Rhythm and Volume of the Interlude

contextualAttributes.comment: The porcelain material might have some symbolism related to the data theme.
The vase shape might also be a metaphor to the music.
The vases are placed in a row.
